passes.notes: Read the copied connector RAW comments and local SRD Healing / Making an Attack references. The modeled runtime effect is limited to preventing Hit Point regain and expiring/cleaning up through turn-boundary and active-effect owners.
Route and witness names use Hit Point, Spell Attack, active effect, healing distribution, and turn-boundary language from copied cleanroom vocabulary.
Connascence is localized in BattleSubjectKind / BattleReducerRouteSubjectFamily / GenericRouteShape / fill matching. Bad missing or mismatched targets reject rather than resolving as no-ops.
Production runtime dispatches on typed active-effect state and route subjects. Authored spell/action names appear only in the cleanroom adapter branch selector and evidence metadata.
Focused replay asserts public BattleEntrypointTrace route events, healing interdiction, duration boundary route, cleanup, and exact copied connector owner/fill vocabulary.
Second pass tightened target-shape handling so HitPointRegainPrevention subjects require explicit targets and healing distribution target mismatches reject.
Full cargo test found one adjacent expected-route owner mismatch; fixed level-one damage spell expected route and reran cargo test successfully.
Added public reducer-owned targeted HitPointRegainPrevention subject construction and moved the adapter off local BattleSubject field construction.

Replaced the boolean regain-prevention state with an Inactive/Active/Expired lifecycle. Duration expiry now transitions Active to Expired, cleanup requires Expired, and focused tests reject cleanup before expiry.
Follow-up lifecycle enforcement dispatches only on typed route subjects and active-effect phase state; no production spell/unit/name/id/provenance dispatch was added.
